item.title: HTB Challenge: SpookyPass
item.description:
HTB Challenge: SpookyPass (Beginner Write-up)

This is my write-up for the HackTheBox challenge SpookyPass.
It’s a reversing challenge, and since I’m still in my first year of university, I’ll keep it simple and explain step by step how I solved it.

Step 1: Download and Unzip the Files

First, I downloaded the zip file from the challenge and unzipped it:

unzip SpookyPass.zip

Inside, I found a folder called rev_spookypass.

item.title: Abdul Rehman
item.description:
👋 Hi, I’m Abdul Rehman

🎓 I’m a BSCS student passionate about cybersecurity and ethical hacking.
💻 I regularly practice on Hack The Box and PortSwigger Academy, sharpening my penetration testing and web security skills.
📚 Currently, I’m studying at Pentester Academy, diving deeper into offensive security techniques and real-world attack vectors.

🚀 What I Do

  • 🔐 Web application security testing
  • 🕵️ Capture The Flag (CTF) challenges
  • 🛡️ Learning penetration testing methodologies
  • 🧩 Exploring vulnerabilities and exploit development

🎯 Goals

My aim is to become a professional penetration tester and security researcher, contributing to making the digital world more secure.
